<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox skin
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|dump_id=<%~ it.dumpId %>
<% if (it.parentLinks) { -%>
|parents=<%~ it.parentLinks %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.rarity) { -%>
|rarity=<%~ it.rarity %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.baseSkin) { -%>
|base_skin=<%~ it.baseSkin %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.flags) { -%>
|flags=<%~ it.flags %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.variantCount) { -%>
|variant_count=<%= it.variantCount %>
<% } -%>
|is_universal=<%= it.isUniversal ? 'Yes' : 'No' %>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<% if (it.descriptionText) { -%>
<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasModifiers) { %>
<section begin="modifiers" />
<%~ it.modifiersSection -%>
<section end="modifiers" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariants) { %>
<section begin="variants" />
<%~ it.variantsSection -%>
<section end="variants" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasNameModifiers) { %>
<section begin="name_modifiers" />
<%~ it.nameModifiersSection -%>
<section end="name_modifiers" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Skins]]
<% if (it.rarity) { -%>
[[Category:<%= it.rarity %> Skins]]
<% } -%>
<% if (it.isUniversal) { -%>
[[Category:Universal Skins]]
<% } -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated skin source pages]]
